title: logrotate bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[3.18.0-12]
- allow to disable state management (RHEL-69959)

[3.18.0-11]
- fix memory corruption issues in config file parsing (RHEL-91449)

[3.18.0-10]
- allow to disable state management (RHEL-69959)
full_text:
